actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The nothic makes two Claw attacks.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) Slashing damage.

actions.name: Rotting Gaze
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 13, one creature the nothic can see within 120 feet. Failure: 17 (5d6) Necrotic damage. Success: Half damage.

bonus_actions.name: Weird Insight (Recharge 6)
bonus_actions.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 14, one creature the nothic can see within 120 feet. Failure: The nothic magically learns one fact or secret about the target.

tactical_info.environment: Underground ruins, forgotten libraries, aberrant lairs, places of lost knowledge
tactical_info.tactics: Uses truesight to detect hidden enemies, rotting gaze for ranged damage, weird insight to gather secrets for bargaining
tactical_info.weaknesses: Moderate combat ability, relies on information gathering and ranged attacks, vulnerable to sustained melee assault
